creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 150901
Makefile.patch

I have monitoring server with nagios installed. Also I need some more images (logos) from misc/nagios-base-logos. But both nagios and misc/nagios-base-logos have got some common images. So there is conflict during installation.

I think it is good idea to install misc/nagios-base-logos to base/ subdir. This will be more elstic for users.

I've made patches. They are very simple. I'll test them via poudriere soon, so I will attach poudriere logs also
